The '''''Starlite Cloud''''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] cruise liner that visited [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]] in [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]]. During its stopover there, the twelve-year-old [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] joined the crew as a cabin steward. She worked on the ship for two years before leaving for another job.<ref name="psg">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref> Also among its crewmembers was the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mussat Nasrabi]] who served as chief engineer.<ref name="idc">''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''</ref>

While on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], the rebel agent [[Rixen]] used finding directions to the ''Starlite Cloud'' as a cover for her conversation with the information [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[L1V-IN]].<ref name="ded">{{WEGCite|story=Dead End Drop|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}}</ref> The Rebel agent [[Iona Wince]] also served as crew on the liner.<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the cruise liner was chartered by the performers of the ''[[The Kallea Cycle|Kallea Cycle]]'' for their tour of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] and [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] regions.<ref name="Galaxywide NewsNets">{{JournalCite|14|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>
